name: Triple Rich Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate and butter, melting them over low heat while stirring constantly.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add the melted chocolate mixture to the beaten egg and sugar, stirring well.
4. Stir in the flour and chopped pecans. Pour the batter into a lightly buttered 9-inch square pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes, or until set. Allow to cool completely.
6. Prepare the second layer by creaming together the butter, powdered sugar, vanilla, and whipping cream in another bowl.
7. Spread this mixture evenly over the cooled brownies.
8. In a heat-safe bowl, melt the remaining chocolate and butter over low heat.
9. Pour the melted chocolate over the second layer of whipped topping.
10. Allow the layers to chill until firm.
11. Once set, cut into one-inch squares. This recipe yields approximately 36 pieces.
